forward.note: Calpine adds ~$2/share EPS one year after close; the >20% base growth is the core forward earnings frame.

trail.val: FCF ~$8.4B for 2026-2027; $11.5-13B for 2028-2029 (~45% growth at midpoint)

forward.note: Step-up into 2028-29 underpins the $5B buyback authorization and capital-return story.

trail.val: Meta-Clinton 20yr PPA, full 1,121 MW output, starting June 2027
Microsoft-Crane (TMI Unit 1 restart) 20yr PPA, 835 MW, starting 2028
Crane restart progressing 'no new challenges'; filed CIR transfer targeting 2027 capacity credit
JPM deal table reconfirms Constellation-Meta Clinton 1.1 GW 20-yr beginning June 2027

forward.note: Two marquee contracts ramp 2027 (Clinton) and 2028 (Crane); FERC CIR-transfer ruling Jun-Jul 2026 unlocks 2027 credit.

trail.val: ~900-1,000 MW of uprates identified; 1,000 MW demand response (=an entire nuclear plant in PJM ELCC)
~5,000 MW new resources (uprates/gas/battery) into PJM queue; Byron/Braidwood accretive in plan; LaSalle/Limerick/Calvert Cliffs out of EPS until 2030

forward.note: Uprates are capital-efficient (>10% organic IRRs, no incremental O&M/fuel); the bigger uprates only hit EPS post-2030.

trail.val: demand 'hotter than ever'; deals promised 'before the Q4 call'
deals still not announced; some conversations 'paused' awaiting PJM clarity; expects regulatory clarity 'by year-end' as the unlock; hyperscaler capex ~75% higher

forward.note: Deal timing keeps slipping on PJM/FERC dependence - the central bear point on long-term contracted visibility vs BYOG.
